understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the current BP35 level (and subsequent levels) by navigating the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` without dying, doing so efficiently within the limited turns and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn allowed a horizontal MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT, after which gravity automatically carried the character in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile, hitting a spike hazard (`u`/`v`) which immediately ended the attempt, or reaching the goal `+`. CLICK could be used on specific clickable tiles (notably breakable blocks `x`) by providing a target coordinate to remove/alter them and open new fall paths; clicks did not consume movement-based timers when present. UNDO reverted the previous action to recover from mistakes. Planning relied on the state’s left/right landing previews and corridor scan to find safe passage columns that drop to new sections, and to avoid moves that would land on spikes.
